ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_standard_name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the size standard is commonly used */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size standard is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_parameters" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement parameter */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the measurement parameter is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garment_types" (
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garment type */,
  "garment_name" TEXT /* Name of the garment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garment type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the garment type */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the garment type is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "garment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garment type */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size standard */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "measurement_values" TEXT /* Comma-separated measurement values for each size */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the size chart is applicable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the size chart */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_garment_id FOREIGN KEY ("garment_id") REFERENCES garment_types ("garment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is applicable */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product variant */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variant in stock */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product variant */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the product variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product variant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., neck, chest) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was taken */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
